name: Fat Free Fudge- Good
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine 3 cups sugar, 2/3 cup cocoa (Hershey Low Fat), and 1 1/2 cups evaporated skim milk.
2. Bring the mixture to a full boil, stirring constantly until it reaches a soft ball stage of 234°F on a candy thermometer.
3. Remove from heat and sprinkle with 1/4 cup Butter Buds® and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract and 1/2 teaspoon almond extract.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to 110°F before spreading into an 8 or 9-inch pan.
5. Cool completely, then cut into squares.
NOTES: Per Serving Calories - 45 Total Fat - .1g (2% of daily value).
